macro.title: MBA chief economist says mortgage rates, inflation will stay elevated through 2026
macro.what: MBA’s Mike Fratantoni expects 2026 inflation near 4% and no Fed cuts, keeping mortgage rates and bond yields elevated.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Why is housing inventory growth slowing down in 2026?
macro.what: Inventory is up from record lows, but new listings remain below normal, keeping 2026 growth rates below last year’s peak.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Veterans United seeks dismissal of VA impersonation, steering lawsuit

macro.title: Fed, Mortgage Rates Likely to Hold Steady on Latest Inflation Report
macro.what: Takeaway: Headline inflation, which includes food and energy prices, spiked in March, but rates won’t move much today because core inflation, which ignores those volatile components, remained subdued
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: California lawmakers weigh state-backed loans for downtown housing towers
housing.what: Assembly Bill 2074, dubbed the Downtown Revitalization Act, would ease approvals and offer state-backed, low-interest financing near major transit hubs.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: White House backs deregulation as it looks to address estimated 10M housing deficit
housing.what: White House ties housing costs to overregulation and a deficit of 10 million single-family homes as builders face high costs and shrinking margins.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: UWM, Mat Ishbia sued after Michigan State football coach’s harassment fallout
housing.what: Brenda Tracy, who reported sexual harassment against former Michigan State University head football coach Mel Tucker, is suing United Wholesale Mortgage (UWM) and CEO Mat Ishbia.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: As policy uncertainty rattles older investors, how can reverse mortgage pros respond?
housing.what: Better integration of housing wealth through reverse mortgages could help, although reputational and educational hurdles persist.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Broeksmit outlines next steps as MBA ramps up advocacy efforts
housing.what: At MBA's National Advocacy Conference, Bob Broeksmit urged members to intensify advocacy as lawmakers consider housing policy changes.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: As Compass grows, scrutiny builds over private listings and double-ending
housing.what: CPC review of 5,000 sales finds Compass at 29.7% to 39.5% share in five metros, raising double-ending and private listing concerns.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Redfin Earns Top 10 Spot in RealTrends Verified Rankings, Powered by Agent Productivity
housing.what: Redfin has been recognized among the top residential real estate brokerages for the fourth year in a row! In 2025, our agents closed 50,484 transactions, totaling nearly $32 billion in sales – earning the #8 spot on the RealTrends Verified Brokerage Rankings by both sales volume and transaction count
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: A Record 34% of February Home Sellers Cut Their List Price
housing.what: February home sellers who cut their price lowered it by $41,000, on average, or 7.3%
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: Brynn Carmody’s burnout as a real estate agent sparked an AI platform for the entire industry
notables.what: Her Market Lab launched Monday, offering agents a CRM with integrated AI, brand voice tools and compliance document inputs.
notables.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
notables.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
